name: Skyline Scout Bot
oracle_text: Alt-Mode (Tactical Flight Deployment) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 0/3 and it gains flying. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Scanning the horizon for Decepticon movement before the first strike is ever launched.
design_notes: Designed to support the WU Skyline Patrol archetype by providing a utility-based Alt-Mode. As an uncommon, it focuses on a single complex mechanic (Alt-Mode) and offers a tactical choice between offensive presence (2/1 robot) and defensive mobility (0/3 flyer). This fits the blue color identity of shifting form to evade or defend.
